title: Everything You Need to Know About Transaction Logs for Digital Product Sales
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Are you a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya struggling to sell ebooks, courses, and digital products online due to PayPal restrictions? Perhaps you're tired of Gumroad's fees and limited payment options. With NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's infrastructure, you can break free from these limitations and start selling your digital products instantly, without the need for a PayPal account or KYC checks. But how do you keep track of your sales and deliveries? That's where transaction logs come in — a vital tool for digital product sellers. In this post, we'll dive into the world of transaction logs and explore what they are, how they work, and why they matter for your business.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Transaction logs are a record of every transaction, including sales, deliveries, and payments, made on your digital product store. It's a centralized hub that allows you to monitor every aspect of your business, from order management to real-time analytics. With transaction logs, you can keep track of your sales, identify trends, and make data-driven decisions to optimize your sales strategy. Whether you're selling ebooks, courses, or digital downloads, transaction logs give you the insights you need to grow your business and reach new customers.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard integrates with NOWPayments to provide a seamless transaction log experience. When a sale is made, the transaction is recorded in the Admin Dashboard, where you can view order details, payment status, and delivery confirmation. This ensures that you have a complete record of every transaction, including sales, refunds, and cancellations. By automating this process, you can save time and reduce errors, giving you more time to focus on creating and marketing your digital products.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Transaction logs are a game-changer for digital creators who struggle to manage their sales and deliveries. Whether you're selling ebooks, courses, or digital downloads, transaction logs provide a clear picture of your business performance. With Unchained Commerce's infrastructure, you can tap into a global market of customers, without the need for complex payment systems or KYC checks. By using transaction logs, you can stay on top of your sales and deliveries, even from remote locations.
Transaction logs give you a clear picture of your business performance, allowing you to make data-driven decisions to optimize your sales strategy.

Remember, transaction logs are a vital tool for any digital product seller, and with Unchained Commerce's infrastructure, you can access this powerful tool and start growing your business today.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard integrates with NOWPayments to provide a seamless transaction log experience, saving you time and reducing errors.

Your Action Checklist

Prepare your product files in delivery-ready format — PDF for ebooks, ZIP archives for multi-file products like font families or preset packs. Set your prices in USD and use NOWPayments to handle the crypto equivalent calculation automatically. Deploy the Core Shop Engine and configure your product list with file paths, prices, and delivery settings. Set up Web3 Wallet Connect with your product display and checkout configuration. Test the checkout flow in a browser on both desktop and mobile — confirm the QR code generates correctly and the payment amount displays accurately. Complete a real mainnet test transaction and confirm the delivery email arrives with a working download link. Open the Admin Dashboard and verify the test transaction appears with correct details. Once the test passes, publish your store URL across your content channels. Review your first week of transactions in the Admin Dashboard to confirm everything is running correctly.
By using transaction logs, you can stay on top of your sales and deliveries, even from remote locations, and tap into a global market of customers.
